use std::sync::mpsc;
use tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};

async fn poll_loop(rx: mpsc::Receiver<String>) {
    loop {
        match rx.try_recv() {
            Ok(msg) => process(msg),
            Err(mpsc::TryRecvError::Empty) => {
                sleep(Duration::from_millis(1)).await;
            }
            Err(mpsc::TryRecvError::Disconnected) => break,
        }
    }
}

fn process(_s: String) {}
